ddls:
CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "page_fault_count" INTEGER /* Number of page faults */,
  "working_set_size" INTEGER /* Size of the working set in bytes */,
  "quota_paged_pool_usage" INTEGER /* Usage of the paged pool quota in bytes */,
  "quota_peak_paged_pool_usage" INTEGER /* Peak usage of the paged pool quota in bytes */,
  "page_file_usage" INTEGER /* Usage of the page file in bytes */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the process */,
  "disk_io" INTEGER /* Disk I/O operations of the process */,
  "network_usage" INTEGER /* Network usage of the process */,
  "process_status" TEXT /* Current status of the process (e.g., running, stopped, suspended) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the process started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time the process ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail record */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time the process started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time the process ended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user running the process */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the process */,
  "termination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for process termination */,
  "exit_code" INTEGER /* Exit code of the process */,
  "command_line" TEXT /* Command line arguments used to start the process */,
  "working_directory" TEXT /* Working directory of the process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_details_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_details_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent process */,
  "child_process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child process */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, sibling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_relationships_child_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_relationships_parent_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert resolution (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_alerts_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_optimization" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization recommendation */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "recommendation_time" TEXT /* Time the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Description of the optimization recommendation */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation implementation (e.g., not started, in progress, completed) */,
  "estimated_impact" TEXT /* Estimated impact of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_optimization_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "metric_time" TEXT /* Time the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., bytes, percentage) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., system, application) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource the permission applies to (e.g., process, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
